analysis.reasoning: Core message: A diplomatic welcome to the new Dominican Republic Permanent Representative, stressing that China values bilateral ties and cooperation in the UN Security Council and looks forward to strengthening cooperation. Evaluation by narrative: CH1 (West immoral/hostile) – Not present; no mention of the West or criticism. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) – Yes; the tweet emphasizes cooperation, multilateral engagement at the UN/SC, and positive bilateral relations, projecting China as collaborative and constructive internationally. CH3 (epic history) – Not referenced. CH4 (appropriate political system/values domestically) – Not discussed; this is about international cooperation, not domestic system/values. CH5 (CCP government succeeds) – No claims about domestic achievements or leadership. CH6 (culture/nature/heritage) – Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH2.
